title: conyza glutinosa
intro: Conyza glutinosa, also known as sticky fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Conyza glutinosa include its ability to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote healing. In herbal preparations, Conyza glutinosa is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
